description: The Goodyear 12V 7A Smart Battery Charger is a fully automatic, microprocessor-controlled charger designed to keep your vehicle's battery in peak condition. With four versatile charging modes—standard, fast, maintenance, and repair—it caters to a wide range of battery types, including calcium, gel AGM, wet lead-acid, and LiFePO4 batteries. Its advanced recovery function can revive deeply discharged and sulphated batteries, ensuring maximum efficiency and longevity. The charger features an intuitive LED display for real-time charging status updates and offers multiple safety protections, including over-voltage, over-temperature, short-circuit, and polarity protection. Compatible with cars, motorcycles, scooters, and campers, this charger is a reliable solution for maintaining and restoring your battery's performance. Crafted from durable ABS material and equipped with a British Standard plug, the charger is compact (158x85x63mm/6.22x3.35x2.48inch) and lightweight, making it easy to store and transport. It utilizes switching mode technology for efficient power conversion and includes a built-in cooling fan to prevent overheating. With an input voltage of 100-240V AC, 50-60Hz, and a rated output of 12V 7A, it supports batteries ranging from 4Ah to 140Ah and features a minimum starting voltage of 8.0V. Additional safety features include non-battery connection protection, thermal protection (65°C +/-5°C), and an impressive efficiency rate of approximately 85%. Fully compliant with CE, UKCA, and FCC standards, the Goodyear Smart Battery Charger is a must-have tool for any garage, ensuring safe, efficient, and reliable charging for all your vehicles.
